subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer – Public sector
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Riksdata (public sector) is looking for a lead Backend Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: 2025-04-17
  • Duration: 6 months
  • Location: TBD
  • Rate: up to 1175 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • Kotlin
  • AWS
  • Kubernetes
  • MySQL

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
